MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEY EQUIPMENT A DIVISION OF KEYBANK NATIONAL's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
The verified application of Janna Sheiman to appear as counsel pro hac vice to Plaintiff Key Equipment Finance is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed and filed under newly-designated lead case no. CGC-19-572474.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
